text.title: Frontline Validation Protocol Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the frontline-validation-protocol methodology end-to-end.

step.name: plan
step.input: Process variant list + frontline role list
step.action: Build validation matrix (variant × operator × method); secure access agreement.

step.name: shadow-and-observe
step.action: Run shadowing/gemba per slot; capture observation log with closed taxonomy.

step.name: listening-session
step.action: Run structured listening session AFTER observation, same operator; non-leading questions.

step.name: triangulate
step.action: Cluster workarounds; identify variants with insufficient coverage; loop back if needed.

step.name: reconcile
step.action: Produce reconciled_as_is with observed_divergences; sponsor accepts/rejects each with reason.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
